name: LUMEN Look
description: Default camera rendering profile. Applied automatically to every image. Modelled on Leica camera colour science. Values derived from measured LibRaw/dcraw colour matrices across 15 Leica cameras (M8, M9, M10, M240, Q, Q2, CL, SL, S2, S3, T, TL, TL2, X1, X2).

grading_matrix.description: 3x3 colour grading matrix applied in linear light after camera matrix (stage 5). Adds ~2% warm bias modelling average Leica R/B channel ratio of 1.55.

tone_curve.description: Gentle S-curve replacing phone-style tone mapping with camera-style rendering. True blacks, slight midtone lift, organic highlight rolloff. Applied at display encoding (stage 11).

saturation.description: Global saturation multiplier. Below 1.0 pulls back phone oversaturation toward natural camera levels.

vignette.description: Models natural lens light falloff. Draws eye to centre, adds depth. Matches Leica Authentic mode approach.

sharpening.description: Gentle unsharp mask. Resolves detail without visible edge halos. Opposite of aggressive phone sharpening.
